The '''Fourth Fleet''' of the [[Galactic Alliance Defense Fleet]] was one of the five main fleets of the Galactic Alliance government. It first saw service during the latter stages of the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]]. It was formed out of the [[New Republic Fourth Fleet|New Republic Fourth Battle Group]]. The fleet was nicknamed the "Fearless Fourth" due to the skill of its crews.

==History==
Following the reorganization of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] into the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]], four strategic fleets were assembled, modeled after the five strategic fleets of the old [[New Republic Defense Fleet/Legends|New Republic Defense Fleet]].

During the [[Battle of Yuuzhan'tar]], the fleet was under the command of [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Gilad Pellaeon/Legends|Gilad Pellaeon]], commanding from the Star Destroyer ''[[Right to Rule]]''. The Fourth Fleet was the first Alliance fleet to arrive in-system, responsible for inserting Alliance troops onto the planet's surface to meet up with local resistance groups. The fleet was a mix of Alliance warships and ships of the [[Imperial Remnant]].

Under [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Ratobo]] and then-Admiral [[Gavin Darklighter]] after Ratobo's death, the Fourth Fleet took an active role in defending the Core during the [[Second Galactic Civil War]], fighting the [[Confederation]] at [[Balmorra/Legends|Balmorra]] and [[Kuat/Legends|Kuat]] in [[40 ABY/Legends|40 ABY]]. Half of the Fourth Fleet fought under [[Darth Caedus|Jacen Solo]] at the [[Second Battle of Fondor]].

The Fourth remained loyal to [[Darth Caedus|Jacen Solo]] now operating openly as [[Darth Caedus]]. The Fourth would later support the Imperial Remnant in its occupation of the [[Roche system]] guarding convoys from [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[StealthX]] raids. They would later constitute the Galactic Alliance element of the [[Second Battle of Roche]] between Imperial, [[Alliance-in-exile]], Confederation, [[Jedi Coalition]], Galactic Alliance and [[Maw Irregular Fleet]] forces.
